property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Modal Title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Modal Icon Name.

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: The mode used to determine the data visibility. Student = can only see requirements with visibility = Student, Faculty = can only see requirments with visibility = Student/Faculty, Admin = can see all requirements.

property.name: openIcon
property.label: Icon For Open Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with open review status type.

property.name: submittedIcon
property.label: Icon For Submitted Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with submitted review status type.

property.name: reviewingIcon
property.label: Icon For Reviewing Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with reviewing review status type.

property.name: acceptedIcon
property.label: Icon For Accepted Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with accepted review status type.

property.name: rejectedIcon
property.label: Icon For Rejected Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with rejected review status type.

property.name: cancelledIcon
property.label: Icon For Cancelled Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with cancelled review status type.

property.name: resubmissionRequestedIcon
property.label: Icon for Resubmission Requested
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with Resubmission Requested submission status type.

property.name: requirementSetTitleField
property.label: Parent Requirement Set Title Format
property.description: The Parent Individiual Requirement Set format to be displayed as the title for group. e.g., {reduivy__Individual_Achievement__r.Name} - {Name}

property.name: requirementTitleField
property.label: Individual Requirement Title Field
property.description: The Individual Requirement object field to be used to display the title e.g., Name

property.name: requirementDetailsFields
property.label: Individual Requirement Details Fields
property.description: The Individual Requirement object fields to be used to display the details in semi-colon separated value. e.g., reduivy__Due_Date__c;reduivy__Requirement_Details__c

property.name: showRequirementRowDetailsButton
property.label: Enable View Requirement Link/Button
property.description: Allow users to click on the Individual Requirement title or details button to view the requirement record.

property.name: showRequirementUserActionButton
property.label: Enable User Action Button
property.description: Allow users to click on the done button to mark a Individual Requirement as submitted.

property.name: showRequirementApprovalActionButton
property.label: Enable Admin Approval Action Button
property.description: Allow faculty or admin users to click on the dropdown menu to update the requirement review status.

property.name: showSubmittedCount
property.label: Show Submitted Count
property.description: Display the total submitted requirement count.

property.name: showReviewedCount
property.label: Show Reviewed Count
property.description: Display the total reviewed requirement count.

property.name: achievementDetailsFields
property.label: Individual Achievement Details Fields
property.description: The Individual Achievement object fields to be used to display the details in semi-colon separated value. e.g., Name;reduivy__Educational_Institution_Name__c;reduivy__Details__c

property.name: createAchievementDetailsFieldSet
property.label: Details Field Set for Creating Individual Achievement
property.description: The Individual Achievement object field setto be used when creating new Individual Achievement.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: File Download URL
property.description: The url to download the file. {0} will be replaced by the record id. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: promptRemarksAfterReviewStatusUpdate
property.label: Prompt Remarks After Review Status Update
property.description: If true, show the Update Remarks Modal after the review status is updated.

property.name: showRemarksAction
property.label: Show Remarks Action
property.description: If true, show the update remarks option in menu.

property.name: remarksFieldSetName
property.label: Remarks Field Set Name
property.description: Individual Requirement Field set name of the fields to be displayed on Update Remarks modal.

property.name: submissionStatus
property.label: Submission Status
property.description: Submission status of the Individual Requirement when the Done button is clicked.

property.name: childrenRelationshipName
property.label: Related Relationship for Requirements
property.description: The child relationship name to the child record containing requirements.

property.name: childrenRequirementSetTitleFormat
property.label: Children Requirement Set Title Format
property.description: The Child Individiual Requirement Set format to be displayed as the title for group. e.g., {reduivy__Individual_Achievement_Unit__r.Name} - {Name}

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Automatically bind the page's record id to the component variable.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object Name
property.description: Automatically bind the page's object name to the component variable

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Modal Title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Modal Icon Name.

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: The mode used to determine the data visibility. Student = can only see requirements with visibility = Student, Faculty = can only see requirments with visibility = Student/Faculty, Admin = can see all requirements.

property.name: openIcon
property.label: Icon For Open Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with open review status type.

property.name: submittedIcon
property.label: Icon For Submitted Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with submitted review status type.

property.name: reviewingIcon
property.label: Icon For Reviewing Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with reviewing review status type.

property.name: acceptedIcon
property.label: Icon For Accepted Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with accepted review status type.

property.name: rejectedIcon
property.label: Icon For Rejected Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with rejected review status type.

property.name: cancelledIcon
property.label: Icon For Cancelled Review Status Type
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with cancelled review status type.

property.name: resubmissionRequestedIcon
property.label: Icon for Resubmission Requested
property.description: Icon for Individual Requirement with Resubmission Requested submission status type.

property.name: requirementSetTitleField
property.label: Parent Requirement Set Title Format
property.description: The Parent Individiual Requirement Set format to be displayed as the title for group. e.g., {reduivy__Individual_Achievement__r.Name} - {Name}

property.name: requirementTitleField
property.label: Individual Requirement Title Field
property.description: The Individual Requirement object field to be used to display the title e.g., Name

property.name: requirementDetailsFields
property.label: Individual Requirement Details Fields
property.description: The Individual Requirement object fields to be used to display the details in semi-colon separated value. e.g., reduivy__Due_Date__c;reduivy__Requirement_Details__c

property.name: showRequirementRowDetailsButton
property.label: Enable View Requirement Link/Button
property.description: Allow users to click on the Individual Requirement title or details button to view the requirement record.

property.name: showRequirementUserActionButton
property.label: Enable User Action Button
property.description: Allow users to click on the done button to mark a Individual Requirement as submitted.

property.name: showRequirementApprovalActionButton
property.label: Enable Admin Approval Action Button
property.description: Allow faculty or admin users to click on the dropdown menu to update the requirement review status.

property.name: showSubmittedCount
property.label: Show Submitted Count
property.description: Display the total submitted requirement count.

property.name: showReviewedCount
property.label: Show Reviewed Count
property.description: Display the total reviewed requirement count.

property.name: achievementDetailsFields
property.label: Individual Achievement Details Fields
property.description: The Individual Achievement object fields to be used to display the details in semi-colon separated value. e.g., Name;reduivy__Educational_Institution_Name__c;reduivy__Details__c

property.name: createAchievementDetailsFieldSet
property.label: Details Field Set for Creating Individual Achievement
property.description: The Individual Achievement object field set to be used when creating new Individual Achievement.

property.name: downloadUrl
property.label: File Download URL
property.description: The url to download the file. {0} will be replaced by the record id. Only applies when the child object is ContentVersion.

property.name: promptRemarksAfterReviewStatusUpdate
property.label: Prompt Remarks After Review Status Update
property.description: If true, show the Update Remarks Modal after the review status is updated.

property.name: showRemarksAction
property.label: Show Remarks Action
property.description: If true, show the update remarks option in menu.

property.name: remarksFieldSetName
property.label: Remarks Field Set Name
property.description: Individual Requirement Field set name of the fields to be displayed on Update Remarks modal.

property.name: submissionStatus
property.label: Submission Status
property.description: Submission status of the Individual Requirement when the Done button is clicked.

property.name: childrenRelationshipName
property.label: Related Relationship for Requirements
property.description: The child relationship name to the child record containing requirements.

property.name: childrenRequirementSetTitleFormat
property.label: Children Requirement Set Title Format
property.description: The Child Individiual Requirement Set format to be displayed as the title for group. e.g., {reduivy__Individual_Achievement_Unit__r.Name} - {Name}

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
